prompt: We're about to push our Django app to production for the first time. Before we go live, do a full security audit — check everything: secrets in git history, container vulnerabilities, Python dependencies, Django settings, Docker Compose config, the works. Write a report.

assertions.description: A security-report.md file is written to outputs/
Report contains an Executive Summary with severity counts (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
Report includes a clear production-ready verdict (SECURE, NEEDS ATTENTION, or CRITICAL ISSUES)
Report checks Django security settings (DEBUG, HTTPS, cookies)
Report audits docker-compose.yml for port exposure and credentials
If security tools (bandit, trivy, trufflehog) are missing, they are documented with install instructions
